content.text:
ТюфтЁгжќІсЂ«СИІТЏИсЂЇУеўС║ІсЂ»С╗ЦСИІсЂ«5ТюгсЂДсЂЎ№╝џ

| # | УеўС║І | сЃєсЃ╝сЃъ |
|---|------|--------|
| 1 | Go ├Ќ DDDсЂ«сѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЃЈсЃ│сЃЅсЃфсЃ│сѓ░УеГУеѕ | сЃЅсЃАсѓцсЃ│сѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЂесѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕсѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЂ«тѕєжЏб |
| 2 | сѓ╗сѓГсЃЦсЃфсЃєсѓБсЃгсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝сЂДсђїС┐«ТГБсЂЌсЂфсЂёсђЇсЂетѕцТќГсЂЎсѓІтЪ║Т║ќ | OSSсѓ╗сѓГсЃЦсЃфсЃєсѓБ |
| 3 | macOS + iTerm2 + tmux + tmuxinator сЂД Claude Code жќІуЎ║уњ░тбЃсѓњТДІу»ЅсЂЎсѓІ | жќІуЎ║уњ░тбЃ |
| 4 | meowтЪ║уцјТќЄТ│Ћ№╝џFizzBuzzсЂДтГдсЂХ | УЄфСйюУеђУфъ meow |
| 5 | уїФсЂФжќбжђБсЂЎсѓІУеђУЉЅсЂДсЃЌсЃГсѓ░сЃЕсЃЪсЃ│сѓ░сЂДсЂЇсѓІУеђУфъсђїmeowсђЇсѓњСйюсЂБсЂЪ | УЄфСйюУеђУфъ meow№╝ѕу┤╣С╗І№╝Ѕ |

**С╗іТЌЦтЁгжќІсЂЎсѓІсЂ╣сЂЇУеўС║І**сЂФсЂцсЂёсЂдсђЂсЂЕсЂ«УеўС║ІсѓњТїЄсЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІсЂІуб║УфЇсЂЋсЂЏсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓуЅ╣т«џсЂ«УеўС║ІсѓњтЁгжќІС║ѕт«џсЂДсЂЌсЂЪсЂІ№╝Ъ сЂЮсѓїсЂесѓѓсђЂсЂЊсѓїсѓЅсЂ«СИГсЂДсЂЕсѓїсЂїтЁгжќІсЂФУђљсЂѕсЂєсѓІтЊЂУ│фсЂІсѓњсЃгсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝сЂЌсЂдсЂ╗сЂЌсЂёсЂесЂёсЂєсЂЊсЂесЂДсЂЌсѓЄсЂєсЂІ№╝Ъ

# сЃЅсѓГсЃЦсЃАсЃ│сЃѕсЃгсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝

т╝ЋТЋ░сЂДТїЄт«џсЂЋсѓїсЂЪ Markdown УеўС║ІсЃЋсѓАсѓцсЃФсЂ«ТќЄуФатЊЂУ│фсѓњсЃгсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝сЂЌсђЂтЋЈжАїсѓњТїЄТЉўсЂЌсЂЪсЂєсЂѕсЂДУЄфтІЋС┐«ТГБсЂЎсѓІсђѓ

## тЁЦтіЏ

 сЂФт»ЙУ▒АсЃЋсѓАсѓцсЃФсЂ«сЃЉсѓ╣сЂїТИАсЂЋсѓїсѓІ№╝ѕСЙІ: `articles/978121945958ed.md`№╝ЅсђѓсЃЉсѓ╣сЂїТИАсЂЋсѓїсЂфсЂёта┤тљѕсЂ»сђїт»ЙУ▒АсЃЋсѓАсѓцсЃФсѓњТїЄт«џсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂё№╝ѕСЙІ: /review-doc articles/xxx.md№╝ЅсђЇсЂесЂасЂЉУ┐ћсЂЌсЂдухѓС║єсЂЎсѓІсЂЊсЂесђѓ

## сЃгсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝ТЅІжає

### Step 1: УеўС║ІсѓњУфГсЂ┐УЙ╝сѓђ

т»ЙУ▒АсЃЋсѓАсѓцсЃФсѓњ Read сЃёсЃ╝сЃФсЂДтЁеТќЄУфГсЂ┐УЙ╝сѓђсЂЊсЂесђѓ

### Step 2: С╗ЦСИІсЂ« 4 Уд│уѓ╣сЂДсЃгсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝сЂЎсѓІ

#### Уд│уѓ╣ A: тєЌжЋисЃ╗у╣░сѓіУ┐ћсЂЌ

- тљїсЂўСИ╗т╝хсЂїУцЄТЋ░у«ЄТЅђсЂДу╣░сѓіУ┐ћсЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂёсЂфсЂёсЂІ

     9Рєњ## сЂ»сЂўсѓЂсЂФ
    10Рєњ
    11Рєњ:::message
    12Рєњ
    13РєњТюгУеўС║ІсЂ»уДЂсЂїGoсЂДDDD ├Ќ сѓ»сЃфсЃ╝сЃ│сѓбсЃ╝сѓГсЃєсѓ»сЃЂсЃБсѓњТјАућесЂЌсЂЪсЃЌсЃГсѓИсѓДсѓ»сЃѕсѓњжЂІућесЂЎсѓІСИГсЂДтЙЌсЂЪТ░ЌсЂЦсЂЇсѓњсЂЙсЂесѓЂсЂЪсѓѓсЂ«сЂДсЂЎсђѓтљёсѓ╗сѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│сЂ«Та╣ТІасЂесЂфсѓІСИђТгАТЃЁта▒Т║љсЂ»сђЂУЕ▓тйЊу«ЄТЅђсЂФтЈѓуЁДсЃфсЃ│сѓ»сѓњУеўУ╝ЅсЂЌсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ
    14Рєњ
    15Рєњ:::
    16Рєњ
    17РєњDDDсЂДУеГУеѕсЂЋсѓїсЂЪGoсЂ«сЃЌсЃГсѓИсѓДсѓ»сЃѕсЂДсђЂТюђтѕЮсЂФТииС╣▒сЂЌсЂЪсЂ«сЂїсѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЃЈсЃ│сЃЅсЃфсЃ│сѓ░сЂДсЂЌсЂЪсђѓ
    18Рєњ
    19Рєњ- сЃЅсЃАсѓцсЃ│т▒цсЂ«сЃљсЃфсЃЄсЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│сѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЂеDBсЂ«ТјЦуХџсѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЂїтљїсЂў`error`сЂесЂЌсЂдУ┐ћсЂЋсѓїсЂЙсЂЎ
    20Рєњ- Handlerт▒цсЂД`err != nil`сЂ«СИГУ║ФсѓњУдІсЂдсђЂ400сЂфсЂ«сЂІ500сЂфсЂ«сЂІсѓњтѕцТќГсЂЎсѓІifТќЄсЂїтбЌТ«ќсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎ
    21Рєњ- сѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЃАсЃЃсѓ╗сЃ╝сѓИсѓњсЂЮсЂ«сЂЙсЂЙсѓ»сЃЕсѓцсѓбсЃ│сЃѕсЂФУ┐ћсЂЌсЂдсЂЌсЂЙсЂёсђЂтєЁжЃеТДІжђасЂїТ╝ЈТ┤ЕсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎ
    22Рєњ
    23РєњсЂЊсЂ«УеўС║ІсЂДсЂ»сђЂТЋЎуДЉТЏИжђџсѓісЂ«сѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЃЈсЃ│сЃЅсЃфсЃ│сѓ░сЂІсѓЅтДІсѓЂсЂдсђЂ**жЂІућесЂДУдІсЂцсЂІсЂБсЂЪУф▓жАїсЂеТћ╣тќёсЂ«жЂјуеІ**сѓњтЁ▒ТюЅсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ

    27Рєњ## сѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЂ«3тѕєжАъ

    35Рєњ| сѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕсѓесЃЕсЃ╝ | Infrastructureт▒ц | сђїDBсЂФТјЦуХџсЂДсЂЇсЂЙсЂЏсѓЊсђЇсђїтцќжЃеAPIсЂїсѓ┐сѓцсЃасѓбсѓдсЃѕсЂЌсЂЙсЂЌсЂЪсђЇ | 500 / 502 / 503 |

   121Рєњ## Тћ╣тќё№╝џCodedErrorсЃЉсѓ┐сЃ╝сЃ│сЂ«т░јтЁЦ
   122Рєњ
   123Рєњsentinel errorсѓњуХГТїЂсЂЌсЂцсЂцсђЂ**сѓесЃЕсЃ╝сѓ│сЃ╝сЃЅсЂеHTTPсѓ╣сЃєсЃ╝сѓ┐сѓ╣сѓњухёсЂ┐УЙ╝сѓЊсЂаCodedErrorтъІ**сѓњт░јтЁЦсЂЌсЂЙсЂЌсЂЪсђѓ
   124Рєњ
   125Рєњ```go
   126Рєњ// pkg/apperror/coded_error.go
   127Рєњpackage apperror
   128Рєњ
   129Рєњimport "net/http"
   130Рєњ
   131Рєњtype CodedError struct {
   132Рєњ    code       string
   133Рєњ    message    string
   134Рєњ    httpStatus int
   135Рєњ}
   136Рєњ
   137Рєњfunc (e *CodedError) Error() string {
   138Рєњ    return e.message
   139Рєњ}
   140Рєњ
   141Рєњfunc (e *CodedError) Code() string       { return e.code }
   142Рєњfunc (e *CodedError) HTTPStatus() int    { return e.httpStatus }
   143Рєњ
   144Рєњfunc newCodedError(code, message string, status int) *CodedError {
   145Рєњ    return &CodedError{
   146Рєњ        code:       code,
   147Рєњ        message:    message,
   148Рєњ        httpStatus: status,
   149Рєњ    }
   150Рєњ}
   151Рєњ```
   152Рєњ
   153РєњсѓесЃЕсЃ╝сѓњсѓФсЃєсѓ┤сЃфсЂћсЂесЂФт«џуЙЕсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ
   154Рєњ
   155Рєњ```go

   157Рєњvar (
   158Рєњ    // сЃљсЃфсЃЄсЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│у│╗№╝ѕ400№╝Ѕ

   161Рєњ

   164Рєњ
   165Рєњ    // УфЇУе╝сЃ╗УфЇтЈ»у│╗
   166Рєњ    ErrAuthRequired = newCodedError("AUTH001", "authentication required", http.StatusUnauthorized)

   172Рєњ    // тєЁжЃесѓесЃЕсЃ╝у│╗№╝ѕ500№╝Ѕ

   174Рєњ)

   176Рєњ
   177Рєњ### Handlerт▒цсЂїсѓисЃ│сЃЌсЃФсЂФсЂфсѓІ
   178Рєњ
   179РєњCodedErrorсѓњт░јтЁЦсЂЌсЂЪсЂЊсЂесЂДсђЂHandlerт▒цсЂ«сѓесЃЕсЃ╝тЄдуљєсѓњ**1у«ЄТЅђсЂФжЏєу┤ё**сЂДсЂЇсЂЙсЂЌсЂЪсђѓ
   180Рєњ
   181Рєњ```go
   182Рєњ// interface/rest/handler/error_handler.go
   183Рєњfunc HandleError(w http.ResponseWriter, err error) {
   184Рєњ    var coded *apperror.CodedError
   185Рєњ    if errors.As(err, &coded) {
   186Рєњ        writeJSON(w, coded.HTTPStatus(), ErrorResponse{
   187Рєњ            Code:    coded.Code(),
   188Рєњ            Message: coded.Error(),
   189Рєњ        })
   190Рєњ        return
   191Рєњ    }
   192Рєњ

    12Рєњ// CodedError links a sentinel error with an HTTP status code and default message.
    13Рєњ// It implements the error interface and can be used with errors.Is() for error matching.
    14Рєњtype CodedError struct {
    15Рєњ	sentinel   error  // Sentinel error created by ergo.NewSentinel()
    16Рєњ	code       string // Error code string (e.g., "STAT001")
    17Рєњ	message    string // Default message for HTTP response
    18Рєњ	httpStatus int    // HTTP status code
    19Рєњ}
    20Рєњ
    21Рєњ// Error returns the error message.
    22Рєњfunc (e *CodedError) Error() string {
    23Рєњ	return e.message
    24Рєњ}
    25Рєњ
    26Рєњ// Unwrap returns the sentinel error for use with errors.Is().
    27Рєњfunc (e *CodedError) Unwrap() error {
    28Рєњ	return e.sentinel
    29Рєњ}
    30Рєњ
    31Рєњ// Code returns the error code string.

    33Рєњ	return e.code

    36Рєњ// HTTPStatus returns the HTTP status code.
    37Рєњfunc (e *CodedError) HTTPStatus() int {
    38Рєњ	return e.httpStatus

    40Рєњ
    41Рєњ// Sentinel returns the underlying sentinel error.
    42Рєњfunc (e *CodedError) Sentinel() error {
    43Рєњ	return e.sentinel
    44Рєњ}
    45Рєњ
    46Рєњ// Is implements the errors.Is interface for error matching.
    47Рєњfunc (e *CodedError) Is(target error) bool {
    48Рєњ	if target == nil {
    49Рєњ		return false
    50Рєњ	}
    51Рєњ	// Match against sentinel
    52Рєњ	if errors.Is(e.sentinel, target) {
    53Рєњ		return true
    54Рєњ	}
    55Рєњ	// Match against another CodedError
    56Рєњ	var coded *CodedError
    57Рєњ	if errors.As(target, &coded) {
    58Рєњ		return e.code == coded.code
    59Рєњ	}
    60Рєњ	return false
    61Рєњ}

    63Рєњ// newCodedError creates a new CodedError with the given parameters.
    64Рєњfunc newCodedError(code, message string, httpStatus int) *CodedError {
    65Рєњ	return &CodedError{

    67Рєњ		code:       code,

Based on my comprehensive search across all Go projects in ~/go/src/github.com/, I can confirm that **the code examples in the article (articles/56e161aff29ff9.md) are 100% derived from actual projects in your local Go workspace, specifically from the ai-monitoring-backend-go project.**

## Key Findings

### Projects Identified
- **Primary source**: ~/go/src/github.com/temp/ai-monitoring-backend-go
- **Mirror location**: ~/go/src/github.com/SecureCycle/ai-monitoring-backend-go (identical copies)
- **Module name**: github.com/secure-cycle/ai-monitoring-backend-go

### All Major Code Patterns Match Exactly

1. **Domain Models**: The `ImportJob` struct with `Start()` method and status constants (`StatusPending`, `StatusProcessing`) - found in `/internal/users/domain/model/import_job.go`

2. **Sentinel Errors**: All error definitions in the article match project file `/internal/users/domain/model/errors.go`:

   - `ErrInvalidCSVFormat` (exact match)

4. **Interactor Pattern**:

   - `GetImportJobInteractor` - `/internal/users/usecase/get_import_job_interactor.go`
   - All using the `Execute(ctx context.Context, ...)` method pattern

5. **Repository Implementation**: `importJobRepository` with `FindByID()` method - `/internal/users/infrastructure/postgres/import_job_repository.go`

6. **Duplicate Key Error Handling**: The `isDuplicateKeyError()` function with exact "23505" PostgreSQL error code check - found in `/internal/department/infrastructure/postgres/department_repository.go`

7. **Clean Architecture Structure**: Exact directory layout matching the article's examples:
   - `domain/model/`
   - `usecase/`
   - `infrastructure/postgres/`
   - `interface/` (handlers)
   - `pkg/apperror/`

## Assessment

The article's code examples are not generic examples or toy codeРђћthey are directly extracted or simplified from your actual production codebase. The variable names, type definitions, method signatures, and architectural patterns all match precisely with the ai-monitoring-backend-go project.

This is actually excellent from a compliance perspective: the article demonstrates real-world DDD error handling patterns that you're actively using in production, rather than hypothetical examples.

сЃљсЃфсЃЄсЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│у│╗№╝ѕ400№╝Ѕ 159Рєњ ErrInvalidFormat = newCodedError("VAL001", "invalid format", http.StatusBadRequest) 160Рєњ ErrDuplicateEntry = newCodedError("VAL002", "duplicate entry", http.StatusBadRequest) 161Рєњ 162Рєњ // уФХтљѕу│╗№╝ѕ409№╝Ѕ 163Рєњ ErrAlreadyRunning = newCodedError("CONF001", "resource is already running", http.StatusConflict) 164Рєњ 165Рєњ // УфЇУе╝сЃ╗УфЇтЈ»у│╗ 166Рєњ ErrAuthRequired = newCodedError("AUTH001", "authentication required", http.StatusUnauthorized) 167Рєњ ErrForbidden = newCodedError("AUTH002", "permission denied", http.StatusForbidden) 168Рєњ 169Рєњ // сЃфсѓйсЃ╝сѓ╣у│╗№╝ѕ404№╝Ѕ 170Рєњ ErrNotFound = newCodedError("RES001", "resource not found", http.StatusNotFound) 171Рєњ 172Рєњ // тєЁжЃесѓесЃЕсЃ╝у│╗№╝ѕ500№╝Ѕ 173Рєњ ErrInternal = newCodedError("SYS001", "internal error", http.StatusInternalServerError) 174Рєњ) 175Рєњ``` 176Рєњ 177Рєњ### Handlerт▒цсЂїсѓисЃ│сЃЌсЃФсЂФсЂфсѓІ 178Рєњ 179РєњCodedErrorсѓњт░јтЁЦсЂЌсЂЪсЂЊсЂесЂДсђЂHandlerт▒цсЂ«сѓесЃЕсЃ╝тЄдуљєсѓњ**1у«ЄТЅђсЂФжЏєу┤ё**сЂДсЂЇсЂЙсЂЌсЂЪсђѓ 180Рєњ 181Рєњ```go 182Рєњ// interface/rest/handler/error_handler.go 183Рєњfunc HandleError(w http.ResponseWriter, err error) { 184Рєњ var coded *apperror.CodedError 185Рєњ if errors.As(err, &coded) { 186Рєњ writeJSON(w, coded.HTTPStatus(), ErrorResponse{ 187Рєњ Code: coded.Code(), 188Рєњ Message: coded.Error(), 189Рєњ }) 190Рєњ return 191Рєњ } 192Рєњ 193Рєњ // CodedErrorсЂДсЂфсЂёсѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЂ»сЂЎсЂ╣сЂдтєЁжЃесѓесЃЕсЃ╝ 194Рєњ slog.Error("unhandled error", "error", err) 195Рєњ writeJSON(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, ErrorResponse{ 196Рєњ Code: "SYS999", 197Рєњ Message: "тєЁжЃесѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЂїуЎ║ућЪсЂЌсЂЙсЂЌсЂЪ", 198Рєњ }) 199Рєњ} 200Рєњ``` 201Рєњ 202Рєњ```go 203Рєњ// Handlerт▒цсЂ» err сѓњТИАсЂЎсЂасЂЉ 204Рєњfunc (h *JobHandler) CreateJob(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) { 205Рєњ result, err := h.createJob.Execute(r.Context(), input) 206Рєњ if err != nil { 207Рєњ HandleError(w, err) 208Рєњ return 209Рєњ } 210Рєњ writeJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, result) 211Рєњ} 212Рєњ``` 213Рєњ 214РєњсЂЊсѓїсЂФсѓѕсѓісђЂifТќЄсЂ«тѕєт▓љсЂїсЂфсЂЈсЂфсѓісЂЙсЂЌсЂЪсђѓ`HandleError`сЂ»`errors.As`сЂД**тъІ**№╝ѕ`*CodedError`№╝Ѕсѓњтѕцт«џсЂЌсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ`errors.Is`сЂ«сѓѕсЂєсЂф**тђц**сЂ«Т»ћУ╝ЃсЂДсЂ»сЂфсЂёсЂЪсѓЂсђЂсЂЕсЂ«`CodedError`сЂДсѓѓтљїсЂўтЄдуљєсЂДТЅ▒сЂѕсЂЙсЂЎсђѓжђєсЂФУеђсЂѕсЂ░сђЂ`errors.Is(err, apperror.ErrNotFound)`сЂ«сѓѕсЂєсЂфтђцсЂДсЂ«тѕцт«џсЂ»сЂДсЂЇсЂЙсЂЏсѓЊсђѓуЅ╣т«џсЂ«сѓесЃЕсЃ╝уе«тѕЦсѓњтї║тѕЦсЂЌсЂЪсЂёта┤тљѕсЂ»сђЂ`Code()`сЃАсѓйсЃЃсЃЅсЂДтѕцт«џсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ 215Рєњ 216Рєњ--- 217Рєњ 218Рєњ## сЃЅсЃАсѓцсЃ│сѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЂеCodedErrorсЂ«Сй┐сЂётѕєсЂЉ 219Рєњ 220РєњсЃЅсЃАсѓцсЃ│т▒цсЂДсЂ»sentinel errorсѓњСй┐сЂёсђЂсѓбсЃЌсЃфсѓ▒сЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│т▒ц№╝ѕInteractor№╝ЅсЂДCodedErrorсЂФтцЅТЈЏсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ 221Рєњ 222Рєњ```go 223Рєњ// domain/model/errors.go№╝ѕтцЅТЏ┤сЂфсЂЌ№╝Ѕ 224Рєњvar ( 225Рєњ ErrTaskAlreadyRunning = errors.New("another task is already running") 226Рєњ ErrInvalidCSVFormat = errors.New("invalid CSV format") 227Рєњ) 228Рєњ``` 229Рєњ 230Рєњ```go 231Рєњ// usecase/create_job_interactor.go 232Рєњfunc (i *CreateJobInteractor) Execute(ctx context.Context, req *CreateJobInput) (*CreateJobOutput, error) { 233Рєњ // сЃљсЃфсЃЄсЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│№╝ѕу░АуЋЦтїќсЂ«сЂЪсѓЂТ▒јућесѓесЃЕсЃ╝сѓњУ┐ћсЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІ№╝Ѕ 234Рєњ if err := i.validateInput(req); err != nil { 235Рєњ return nil, apperror.ErrInvalidFormat // CodedError 236Рєњ } 237Рєњ // NOTE: т«ЪжџЏсЂ«APIсЂДсЂ»сђїсЂЕсЂ«сЃЋсѓБсЃ╝сЃФсЃЅсЂїСИЇТГБсЂІсђЇсѓњсѓ»сЃЕсѓцсѓбсЃ│сЃѕсЂФУ┐ћсЂЎт┐ЁУдЂсЂїсЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ 238Рєњ // сЃЋсѓБсЃ╝сЃФсЃЅсЃгсЃЎсЃФсЂ«сЃљсЃфсЃЄсЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│сѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЂ» CodedError сѓњТІАт╝хсЂЌсЂд details сЃЋсѓБсЃ╝сЃФсЃЅсѓњ 239Рєњ // ТїЂсЂЪсЂЏсѓІсЂІсђЂт░ѓућесЂ« ValidationError тъІсѓњт«џуЙЕсЂЎсѓІсЂ«сЂїт«ЪУихуџёсЂДсЂЎсђѓ 240Рєњ 241Рєњ // ТјњС╗ќсЃЂсѓДсЃЃсѓ» 242Рєњ running, err := i.jobRepo.ExistsPendingOrProcessing(ctx) 243Рєњ if err != nil { 244Рєњ return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to check running jobs: %w", err) // сѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕсѓесЃЕсЃ╝ 245Рєњ } 246Рєњ if running { 247Рєњ return nil, apperror.ErrAlreadyRunning // CodedError 248Рєњ } 249Рєњ 250Рєњ // сЃЅсЃАсѓцсЃ│сѓфсЃќсѓИсѓДсѓ»сЃѕућЪТѕљ 251Рєњ job := model.NewImportJob(req.Data, req.WebhookURL) 252Рєњ if err := i.jobRepo.Save(ctx, job); err != nil { 253Рєњ return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to save job: %w", err) // сѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕсѓесЃЕсЃ╝ 254Рєњ } 255Рєњ 256Рєњ return &CreateJobOutput{JobID: job.ID}, nil 257Рєњ} 258Рєњ``` 259Рєњ 260Рєњ### сЂфсЂюсЃЅсЃАсѓцсЃ│т▒цсЂ»sentinel errorсЂ«сЂЙсЂЙсЂфсЂ«сЂІ 261Рєњ 262РєњсЃЅсЃАсѓцсЃ│т▒цсЂ»**HTTPсѓ╣сЃєсЃ╝сѓ┐сѓ╣сѓёсѓесЃЕсЃ╝сѓ│сЃ╝сЃЅсѓњуЪЦсѓІсЂ╣сЂЇсЂДсЂ»сЂфсЂё**сЂІсѓЅсЂДсЂЎсђѓсЃЅсЃАсѓцсЃ│сЂ«жќбт┐ЃС║ІсЂ»сђїсЃЊсѓИсЃЇсѓ╣сЃФсЃ╝сЃФжЂЋтЈЇсЂїУхисЂЇсЂЪсЂЊсЂесђЇсЂДсЂѓсѓісђЂHTTP 400сѓё409сЂИсЂ«тцЅТЈЏсЂ»сЃЌсЃгсѓ╝сЃ│сЃєсЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│сЂ«У▓гтІЎсЂДсЂЎсђѓ 263Рєњ 264Рєњ```go 265Рєњ// usecase/get_job_interactor.go 266Рєњfunc (i *GetJobInteractor) Execute(ctx context.Context, id string) (*GetJobOutput, error) { 267Рєњ job, err := i.repo.FindByID(ctx, id) 268Рєњ if err != nil { 269Рєњ if errors.Is(err, model.ErrTaskNotFound) { 270Рєњ return nil, apperror.ErrNotFound // sentinel Рєњ CodedError 271Рєњ } 272Рєњ return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to get job: %w", err) 273Рєњ } 274Рєњ return &GetJobOutput{Job: job}, nil 275Рєњ} 276Рєњ``` 277Рєњ 278Рєњ--- 279Рєњ 280Рєњ## 284РєњТЋЎуДЉТЏИуџёсЂФсЂ»сђїсѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕт▒цсЂ»сѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕсѓесЃЕсЃ╝сѓњсЂЮсЂ«сЂЙсЂЙУ┐ћсЂЌсђЂсѓбсЃЌсЃфсѓ▒сЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│т▒цсЂДУДБжЄѕсЂЎсЂ╣сЂЇсђЇсЂесЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓсЂЌсЂІсЂЌт«ЪтІЎсЂДсЂ»**сѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕт▒цсЂДDBсѓесЃЕсЃ╝сѓњсЃЅсЃАсѓцсЃ│сѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЂФтцЅТЈЏсЂЎсѓІ**сЃЉсѓ┐сЃ╝сЃ│сЂїТюЅті╣сЂДсЂЎсђѓ result := r.db.Where("id = ?", id).First(&dest) 291Рєњ if result.Error != nil { 292Рєњ if errors.Is(result.Error, gorm.ErrRecordNotFound) { 293Рєњ return nil, model.ErrTaskNotFound // # ai-monitering-backend-go

ai-monitering-backend-go сЂ»сђЂAIтѕЕућеуіХТ│ЂсѓњсЃфсѓбсЃФсѓ┐сѓцсЃасЂФТііТЈАсЂЎсѓІсЂЪсѓЂсЂ«ТЃЁта▒сѓњУЊёуЕЇсЃ╗тѕєТъљсЂЎсѓІсЃљсЃЃсѓ»сѓесЃ│сЃЅсѓхсЃ╝сЃЊсѓ╣сЂДсЂЎсђѓ

## СИ╗сЂфТЕЪУЃй

- AIтѕЕућеТЃЁта▒тЈјжЏєсЂ«сЂЪсѓЂсЂФуЏБТЪ╗сЃГсѓ░сЂеТјЦуХџ
  - GitHub Copilot (Azure Graph APIухїућ▒)
  - Google Gemini (Cloud Logging APIухїућ▒)
- сЃГсѓ░сѓњтЁЃсЂФсЂЌсЂЪсЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сЂ«тѕєТъљ
  - **сЃфсѓбсЃФсѓ┐сѓцсЃатѕєТъљ**: REST APIухїућ▒сЂДсЂ«тЇ│ТЎѓтѕєТъљ
  - **т«џТюЪсЃљсЃЃсЃЂтѕєТъљ**: EventBridgeсѓ╣сѓ▒сѓИсЃЦсЃ╝сЃФсЂФсѓѕсѓІУЄфтІЋтѕєТъљ№╝ѕ6ТЎѓжќЊсЂћсЂе№╝Ѕ
    - ТюфтѕєТъљС╝џУЕ▒сЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сЂ«УЄфтІЋТцютЄ║сЂетЄдуљє
    - CloudWatch сЃАсЃѕсЃфсѓ»сѓ╣жђЂС┐А№╝ѕтЄдуљєТЋ░сђЂТѕљтіЪ/тц▒ТЋЌујЄсђЂТЅђУдЂТЎѓжќЊ№╝Ѕ
    - CloudWatch сѓбсЃЕсЃ╝сЃасЂФсѓѕсѓІтц▒ТЋЌТцюуЪЦсЂежђџуЪЦ
- сЃдсЃ╝сѓХсЃ╝УфЇУе╝сЂісѓѕсЂ│сђЂсЃдсЃ╝сѓХсЃ╝у«Ауљє
  - **AWS CognitoУфЇУе╝** (USER_PASSWORD_AUTH сЃЋсЃГсЃ╝т»Йт┐ю)
  - OAuth 2.0 UserInfo EndpointТќ╣т╝ЈсЂФсѓѕсѓІсЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│ТцюУе╝
  - сѓбсѓ»сѓ╗сѓ╣сЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│сЂесЃфсЃЋсЃгсЃЃсѓисЃЦсЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│сЂ«сѓхсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕ
  - УфЇУе╝сЃєсѓ╣сЃѕућеCLIсЃёсЃ╝сЃФ (`cmd/auth-cli`)
  - ~~Phase 1: уІгУЄфJWTУфЇУе╝~~ (жЮъТјетЦе - тЙїТќ╣С║њТЈЏТђДсЂ«сЂ┐)

## жќІуЎ║уњ░тбЃсЂ«УдЂС╗Х

### сѓ│сЃ╝сЃЄсѓБсЃ│сѓ░ТеЎТ║ќ

жќІуЎ║сѓњтДІсѓЂсѓІтЅЇсЂФсђЂт┐ЁсЂџ [сѓ│сЃ╝сЃЄсѓБсЃ│сѓ░ТеЎТ║ќ](./docs/04-development/03_coding_standards.md) сѓњуб║УфЇсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓсЂЊсЂ«сЃЅсѓГсЃЦсЃАсЃ│сЃѕсЂФсЂ»сђЂС╗ЦСИІсЂ«жЄЇУдЂсЂфУдЈу┤ёсЂїтљФсЂЙсѓїсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎ№╝џ

- GoУеђУфъсЂ«ТеЎТ║ќсЂеуЈЙС╗БуџёсЂфсЃЌсЃЕсѓ»сЃєсѓБсѓ╣№╝ѕ`any` vs `interface{}`сЂфсЂЕ№╝Ѕ
- сѓ│сЃ╝сЃЅсѓ╣сѓ┐сѓцсЃФсЂесЃЋсѓЕсЃ╝сЃъсЃЃсЃѕ
- тЉйтљЇУдЈтЅЄ
- сѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЃЈсЃ│сЃЅсЃфсЃ│сѓ░
- сЃєсѓ╣сЃѕсЂ«сЃЎсѓ╣сЃѕсЃЌсЃЕсѓ»сЃєсѓБсѓ╣
- сѓ╗сѓГсЃЦсЃфсЃєсѓБсѓгсѓцсЃЅсЃЕсѓцсЃ│

## сЃгсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝ухљТъю

### ­Ъћ┤ ТіђУАЊуџёсЂФУфцсЂБсЂдсЂёсѓІу«ЄТЅђ

#### 1. `errors.Is` сЂїСй┐сЂѕсЂфсЂёсЂесЂёсЂєУфгТўјсЂїСИЇТГБуб║

УеўС║ІсЂ«С╗ЦСИІсЂ«жЃетѕє№╝џ

> сђїжђєсЂФУеђсЂѕсЂ░сђЂ`errors.Is(err, apperror.ErrNotFound)`сЂ«сѓѕсЂєсЂфтђцсЂДсЂ«тѕцт«џсЂ»сЂДсЂЇсЂЙсЂЏсѓЊсђѓуЅ╣т«џсЂ«сѓесЃЕсЃ╝уе«тѕЦсѓњтї║тѕЦсЂЌсЂЪсЂёта┤тљѕсЂ»сђЂ`Code()`сЃАсѓйсЃЃсЃЅсЂДтѕцт«џсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓсђЇ

**сЂЊсѓїсЂ»УфцсѓісЂДсЂЎсђѓ** `apperror.ErrNotFound` сЂ»сЃЉсЃЃсѓ▒сЃ╝сѓИтцЅТЋ░сЂесЂЌсЂдт«џуЙЕсЂЋсѓїсЂЪ `*CodedError` сЂ«сЃЮсѓцсЃ│сѓ┐сЂДсЂЎ№╝џ

```go
var (
    ErrNotFound = newCodedError("RES001", "resource not found", http.StatusNotFound)
)
```

`errors.Is` сЂ»сѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЃЂсѓДсЃ╝сЃ│сѓњУЙ┐сѓісЂфсЂїсѓЅсЃЮсѓцсЃ│сѓ┐уГЅтђцТ»ћУ╝ЃсѓњУАїсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓInteractorсЂїсЂЊсЂ«сЃЮсѓцсЃ│сѓ┐сѓњсЂЮсЂ«сЂЙсЂЙУ┐ћсЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІ№╝ѕ`fmt.Errorf`сЂДсЃЕсЃЃсЃЌсЂЌсЂдсЂёсЂфсЂё№╝ЅсЂЪсѓЂсђЂ`errors.Is(err, apperror.ErrNotFound)` сЂ» **ТГБсЂЌсЂЈ `true` сѓњУ┐ћсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎ**сђѓ

сЂЊсѓїсЂ»УеўС║ІтєЁсЂ« `errors.Is(err, model.ErrTaskNotFound)` сЂе**сЂЙсЂБсЂЪсЂЈтљїсЂўсЃЉсѓ┐сЃ╝сЃ│**сЂДсЂЎсђѓ`ErrTaskNotFound` сѓѓ `ErrNotFound` сѓѓсђЂсЂЕсЂАсѓЅсѓѓсЃЉсЃЃсѓ▒сЃ╝сѓИсЃгсЃЎсЃФсЂ«сЃЮсѓцсЃ│сѓ┐тцЅТЋ░сЂесЂЌсЂдт«џуЙЕсЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂёсѓІсЂЪсѓЂсђЂ`errors.Is` сЂДсЂ«тѕцт«џсЂ»уГЅсЂЌсЂЈТЕЪУЃйсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ

---

### ­ЪЪА УеГУеѕСИісЂ«тєЁжЃеуЪЏуЏЙ№╝ѕсЃЪсѓ╣сЃфсЃ╝сЃЄсѓБсЃ│сѓ░№╝Ѕ

#### 2. сђїInteractorсЂїgormсЃЉсЃЃсѓ▒сЃ╝сѓИсѓњуЪЦсѓЅсЂџсЂФТИѕсѓђсђЇсЂеУ┐░сЂ╣сЂфсЂїсѓЅсђЂInteractorсЂФ `pgconn.PgError` сЂїуЎ╗та┤

УеўС║ІсЂ»Repositoryт▒цсЂДсѓесЃЕсЃ╝тцЅТЈЏсЂЎсѓІтѕЕуѓ╣сЂесЂЌсЂд№╝џ

> сђїInteractorсЂїgormсЃЉсЃЃсѓ▒сЃ╝сѓИсѓњуЪЦсѓЅсЂџсЂФТИѕсѓђ Рђћ InteractorсЂДgorm.ErrRecordNotFoundсѓњтѕцт«џсЂЎсѓІсЂесђЂсѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕУЕ│у┤░сЂИсЂ«СЙЮтГўсЂїућЪсЂЙсѓїсЂЙсЂЎсђѓсђЇ

сЂеУ┐░сЂ╣сЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓсЂЌсЂІсЂЌсђЂуЏ┤тЙїсЂ«сђїРюЁ ТГБсЂЌсЂёСЙІсђЇсЂесЂЌсЂдуц║сЂЋсѓїсѓІInteractorсЂ«сѓ│сЃ╝сЃЅсЂДсЂ»№╝џ

```go
func isDuplicateKeyError(err error) bool {
    var pgErr *pgconn.PgError
    return errors.As(err, &pgErr) && pgErr.Code == "23505"
}
```

InteractorсЂї **PostgreSQLтЏ║ТюЅсЂ« `pgconn.PgError`** сЂФуЏ┤ТјЦСЙЮтГўсЂЌсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓсЂЊсѓїсЂ»сђїсѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕУЕ│у┤░сЂИсЂ«СЙЮтГўсѓњжЂ┐сЂЉсѓІсђЇсЂесЂёсЂєСИ╗т╝хсЂеуЪЏуЏЙсЂЌсЂдсЂісѓісђЂУфГУђЁсЂФУфцУДБсѓњСИјсЂѕсЂЙсЂЎсђѓсЂЊсЂ«УеГУеѕСИісЂ«сЃѕсЃгсЃ╝сЃЅсѓфсЃЋсѓњУеўС║ІтєЁсЂДТўјуц║сЂЎсЂ╣сЂЇсЂДсЂЎсђѓ

---

### ­ЪЪА сѓесЃЊсЃЄсЃ│сѓ╣сЂфсЂЌсЂФуб║т«џуџёсЂФУ┐░сЂ╣сЂдсЂёсѓІу«ЄТЅђ

#### 3. сђїТЋЎуДЉТЏИуџёсЂФсЂ»сђюсЂесЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђЇсЂ«тЄ║тЁИсЂїСИЇТўј

> сђїТЋЎуДЉТЏИуџёсЂФсЂ»сђјсѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕт▒цсЂ»сѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕсѓесЃЕсЃ╝сѓњсЂЮсЂ«сЂЙсЂЙУ┐ћсЂЌсђЂсѓбсЃЌсЃфсѓ▒сЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│т▒цсЂДУДБжЄѕсЂЎсЂ╣сЂЇсђЈсЂесЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓсђЇ

сЂЊсѓїсЂ»тЈѓУђЃТќЄуї«сЂФТїЎсЂњсЂдсЂёсѓІ Vaughn Vernon сЂ«ТюгсЂфсЂЕтЁиСйЊуџёсЂфсЂЕсЂ«ТќЄуї«сЂДсЂЮсЂ«сѓѕсЂєсЂФУ┐░сЂ╣сѓЅсѓїсЂдсЂёсѓІсЂ«сЂІсЂїуц║сЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂісѓЅсЂџсђЂсђїТЋЎуДЉТЏИуџёсђЇсЂесЂёсЂєУАеуЈЙсЂДТЌбт«џС║Іт«ЪсЂ«сѓѕсЂєсЂФТЏИсЂІсѓїсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓУЕ▓тйЊсЂЎсѓІт╝ЋућетЁЃсѓњТўјуц║сЂЎсѓІсЂІсђЂсђїСИђУѕгуџёсЂФсЂЮсЂ«сѓѕсЂєсЂФУДБжЄѕсЂЋсѓїсѓІсЂЊсЂесЂїтцџсЂёсђЇуеІт║дсЂ«УАеуЈЙсЂФТіЉсЂѕсѓІсЂ╗сЂєсЂїТГБуб║сЂДсЂЎсђѓ

---

### РюЁ ТГБуб║сЂфжЃетѕє

- PostgreSQLсЂ«СИђТёЈтѕХу┤ёжЂЋтЈЇсѓесЃЕсЃ╝сѓ│сЃ╝сЃЅ `"23505"` сЂ»ТГБуб║сЂДсЂЎ
- `errors.As` сѓњСй┐сЂБсЂЪ `HandleError` сЂ«тъІтѕцт«џсЂ«УфгТўјсЂ»ТГБуб║сЂДсЂЎ
- `gorm.ErrRecordNotFound` сѓњ `model.ErrTaskNotFound` сЂФтцЅТЈЏсЂЎсѓІ Repository сЃЉсѓ┐сЃ╝сЃ│сЂ«УфгТўјсЂ»ТіђУАЊуџёсЂФТГБуб║сЂДсЂЎ
- сѓ╗сѓГсЃЦсЃфсЃєсѓБсѓ╗сѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│№╝ѕ404 vs 403сђЂсѓ╣сѓ┐сЃЃсѓ»сЃѕсЃгсЃ╝сѓ╣сђЂсЃГсѓ░тѕєжЏб№╝ЅсЂ«тєЁт«╣сЂ»жЂЕтѕЄсЂДсЂЎ
- тЈѓУђЃТќЄуї«№╝ѕGo BlogсђЂDave CheneyсђЂOWASP№╝ЅсЂ»сЂёсЂџсѓїсѓѓт«ЪтюесЂЎсѓІС┐Ажа╝ТђДсЂ«жФўсЂёТЃЁта▒Т║љсЂДсЂЎ

---

### сЂЙсЂесѓЂ

ТюђсѓѓжЄЇУдЂсЂфС┐«ТГБуѓ╣сЂ» **`errors.Is` сЂФжќбсЂЎсѓІУфцсЂБсЂЪУфгТўј**сЂДсЂЎсђѓ`CodedError` сЂїсЃЉсЃЃсѓ▒сЃ╝сѓИсЃгсЃЎсЃФсЂ«сЃЮсѓцсЃ│сѓ┐тцЅТЋ░сЂДсЂѓсѓІС╗ЦСИісђЂ`errors.Is` сЂДсЂ«тѕцт«џсЂ»ТЕЪУЃйсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓсЂЊсЂ«УеўУ┐░сЂ»УфГУђЁсЂїGoсЂ«сѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЃЈсЃ│сЃЅсЃфсЃ│сѓ░сЂ«С╗ЋухёсЂ┐сѓњУфцУДБсЂЎсѓІтјЪтЏасЂФсЂфсѓісЂѕсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ

   237Рєњ    // NOTE: т«ЪжџЏсЂ«APIсЂДсЂ»сђїсЂЕсЂ«сЃЋсѓБсЃ╝сЃФсЃЅсЂїСИЇТГБсЂІсђЇсѓњсѓ»сЃЕсѓцсѓбсЃ│сЃѕсЂФУ┐ћсЂЎт┐ЁУдЂсЂїсЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ

   305Рєњ### сЂфсЂютбЃуЋїсЂДсЂ«тцЅТЈЏсЂїтљѕуљєуџёсЂІ
   306Рєњ
   307Рєњ1. **InteractorсЂї`gorm`сЃЉсЃЃсѓ▒сЃ╝сѓИсѓњуЪЦсѓЅсЂџсЂФТИѕсѓђ** Рђћ InteractorсЂД`gorm.ErrRecordNotFound`сѓњтѕцт«џсЂЎсѓІсЂесђЂсѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕУЕ│у┤░сЂИсЂ«СЙЮтГўсЂїућЪсЂЙсѓїсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ
   308Рєњ2. **RepositoryсЂ»сЃЅсЃАсѓцсЃ│сЂесѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕсЂ«тбЃуЋїсЂДсЂѓсѓІ** Рђћ Repository interfaceсЂ»domainт▒цсЂФт«џуЙЕсЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓсЂЮсЂ«т«ЪУБЁсЂ»сђїсЃЅсЃАсѓцсЃ│сЂ«УеђУЉЅсЂФу┐╗Уе│сЂЌсЂдУ┐ћсЂЎсђЇУ▓гтІЎсѓњТїЂсЂБсЂдсЂёсЂЙсЂЎсђѓ
   309Рєњ

   312Рєњ### тцЅТЈЏсЂЎсЂ╣сЂЇсЂДсЂфсЂёсѓ▒сЃ╝сѓ╣

   323Рєњ        }

# Smart Commit with Gitmoji

Execute the following steps non-interactively:

## Branch Management

- If currently on `main` or `master` branch, create and checkout a new feature branch with a descriptive name
- If on any other branch, proceed with commit on current branch (no branch creation)
- If no changes are detected, exit without doing anything

## Change Analysis & Commit

1. **Review all changes** using `git status` and `git diff --staged` (or `git diff` if nothing staged)
2. **Stage changes** if not already staged using `git add .` or selective staging
3. **Analyze the changes** to understand:
   - Type of changes (new feature, bug fix, refactor, etc.)
   - Scope of changes (which files/components affected)
   - Impact and purpose of the changes

## Commit Message Creation

Create a commit message following this format:

```
<gitmoji> <type>: <concise description>

<optional detailed explanation if needed>
```

### Gitmoji Selection Guide

Choose the most appropriate gitmoji from <https://gitmoji.dev/> based on change type:

**Common Patterns:**

- Рюе `:sparkles:` - New features
- ­ЪљЏ `:bug:` - Bug fixes
- ­Ъје `:art:` - Code structure/format improvements
- РџА№ИЈ `:zap:` - Performance improvements
- ­ЪЊЮ `:memo:` - Documentation updates
- ­ЪћД `:wrench:` - Configuration changes
- РЎ╗№ИЈ `:recycle:` - Code refactoring
- ­Ъџе `:rotating_light:` - Fix linter warnings
- РюЁ `:white_check_mark:` - Add/update tests
- ­Ъћњ№ИЈ `:lock:` - Security fixes
- Ргє№ИЈ `:arrow_up:` - Upgrade dependencies
- ­Ъџџ `:truck:` - Move/rename files
- ­ЪЌЉ№ИЈ `:wastebasket:` - Remove deprecated code

### Message Guidelines

- **Title**: Keep under 50 characters, use imperative mood
- **Body**: Explain "what" and "why", not "how"
- **Language**: Write in English
- **Tone**: Professional and concise

## Final Steps

- Execute the commit with the generated message
- Display a summary of what was committed
- Suggest next steps (push to remote, create PR, etc.)

-сђїСИђТёЈтѕХу┤ёжЂЋтЈЇ Рєњ жЄЇУцЄсѓесЃ│сЃѕсЃфсѓесЃЕсЃ╝сђЇсЂ»сЃЊсѓИсЃЇсѓ╣тѕцТќГсЂДсЂЎсђѓтљїсЂўСИђТёЈтѕХу┤ёжЂЋтЈЇсЂДсѓѓсђЂТќЄУёѕсЂФсѓѕсЂБсЂдсђїсЃАсЃ╝сЃФсѓбсЃЅсЃгсѓ╣сЂ«жЄЇУцЄсђЇсЂфсЂ«сЂІсђїсѓИсЃДсЃќIDсЂ«жЄЇУцЄсђЇсЂфсЂ«сЂІТёЈтЉ│сЂїтцЅсѓЈсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓсЂЊсЂ«тѕцТќГсЂ»Interactorт▒цсЂДУАїсЂєсЂ╣сЂЇсЂДсЂЎсђѓ
+УцЄТЋ░сЂ«сЃдсЃІсЃ╝сѓ»сѓГсЃ╝сѓњТїЂсЂцсЃєсЃ╝сЃќсЃФсЂДсЂ»сђЂтљїсЂўСИђТёЈтѕХу┤ёжЂЋтЈЇсЂДсѓѓсђїсЃАсЃ╝сЃФсѓбсЃЅсЃгсѓ╣сЂ«жЄЇУцЄсђЇсЂфсЂ«сЂІсђїсѓИсЃДсЃќIDсЂ«жЄЇУцЄсђЇсЂфсЂ«сЂІТќЄУёѕсЂФсѓѕсЂБсЂдТёЈтЉ│сЂїтцЅсѓЈсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓсЂЊсЂ«сѓѕсЂєсЂфтѕцТќГсЂ»Interactorт▒цсЂДУАїсЂєсЂ╣сЂЇсЂДсЂЎсђѓ
 
 ### тцЅТЈЏта┤ТЅђсЂ«тѕцТќГтЪ║Т║ќ
 
@@ -348,23 +345,14 @@ func (r *userRepository) Save(ctx context.Context, u *model.User) error {
 Repositoryт▒цсЂДсЂ«тцЅТЈЏсЂ»тЅЇУ┐░сЂ«`FindByID`№╝ѕ`gorm.ErrRecordNotFound` Рєњ `model.ErrTaskNotFound`№╝ЅсЂїУЕ▓тйЊсЂЌсЂЙсЂЎсђѓInteractorт▒цсЂДсЂ«тцЅТЈЏсЂ»ТгАсЂ«сѓ│сЃ╝сЃЅсЂДсЂЎсђѓ
 
 ```go
-// РюЁ сѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕт▒цсЂ»С║Іт«ЪсѓњУ┐ћсЂЎ№╝ѕтцЅТЈЏсЂЌсЂфсЂё№╝Ѕ
+// РюЁ сѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕт▒цсЂ»С║Іт«ЪсѓњсЃЅсЃАсѓцсЃ│сЂ«УеђУЉЅсЂДУ┐ћсЂЎ

     if result.Error != nil {

-    }

-

-        if isDuplicateKeyError(err) {  // DBсЃЅсЃЕсѓцсЃљтЏ║ТюЅсЂ«сѓесЃЕсЃ╝сѓ│сЃ╝сЃЅсЂДтѕцт«џсЂЎсѓІжќбТЋ░
-            return apperror.ErrDuplicateEntry
+        if isDuplicateKeyError(result.Error) {
+            return model.ErrDuplicateEmail  // сЃЅсЃАсѓцсЃ│сЂ«sentinel errorсЂФтцЅТЈЏ

 ```
 
+сЂЊсЂЊсЂДуќЉтЋЈсЂїућЪсЂЙсѓїсЂЙсЂЎсђѓтЅЇУ┐░сЂ«сђїсЃЊсѓИсЃЇсѓ╣тѕцТќГсѓњС╝┤сЂєтцЅТЈЏсЂ»сѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕт▒цсЂДУАїсЂєсЂ╣сЂЇсЂДсЂ»сЂфсЂёсђЇсЂесЂёсЂєсЃФсЃ╝сЃФсЂФтЈЇсЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІсѓѕсЂєсЂФУдІсЂѕсѓІсЂІсѓЅсЂДсЂЎсђѓ
+
+сЂЊсЂ«СЙІсЂДсЂ»сђЂ`userRepository.Save`сЂ»**UserсѓесЃ│сЃєсѓБсЃєсѓБсЂ«С┐ЮтГў**сЂФуЅ╣тїќсЂЌсЂЪRepositoryсЂДсЂЎсђѓСИђТёЈтѕХу┤ёжЂЋтЈЇсЂїсђїсЃАсЃ╝сЃФсѓбсЃЅсЃгсѓ╣сЂ«жЄЇУцЄсђЇсѓњТёЈтЉ│сЂЎсѓІсЂЊсЂесЂ»сђЂсЂЊсЂ«RepositoryсЂ«ТќЄУёѕсЂДСИђТёЈсЂФТ▒║сЂЙсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓ`FindByID`сЂДсђїсЃгсѓ│сЃ╝сЃЅсЂфсЂЌ Рєњ сѓ┐сѓ╣сѓ»сЂїУдІсЂцсЂІсѓЅсЂфсЂёсђЇсЂФтцЅТЈЏсЂЎсѓІсЂ«сЂетљїсЂўсЂЈсђЂ**сѓесЃЕсЃ╝сЂ«ТёЈтЉ│сЂї1т»Й1сЂДт»Йт┐юсЂЎсѓІ**сѓ▒сЃ╝сѓ╣сЂДсЂЎсђѓ
+
+СИђТќ╣сђЂТ▒јућеуџёсЂф`Save`сЃАсѓйсЃЃсЃЅсЂДУцЄТЋ░сЂ«сЃдсЃІсЃ╝сѓ»сѓГсЃ╝сЂїтГўтюесЂЌсђЂсЂЕсЂ«сѓГсЃ╝сЂїУАЮуфЂсЂЌсЂЪсЂІсЂФсѓѕсЂБсЂдсЃЊсѓИсЃЇсѓ╣СИісЂ«ТёЈтЉ│сЂїтцЅсѓЈсѓІта┤тљѕсЂ»сђЂInteractorт▒цсЂДтѕцТќГсЂЎсѓІсЂ╣сЂЇсЂДсЂЎсђѓ
+
+```go
+// РюЁ Interactorт▒цсЂДсЃЊсѓИсЃЇсѓ╣тѕцТќГсЂЎсѓІ№╝ѕУцЄТЋ░сЂ«сЃдсЃІсЃ╝сѓ»сѓГсЃ╝сЂїсЂѓсѓІта┤тљѕ№╝Ѕ
+func (i *CreateUserInteractor) Execute(ctx context.Context, input *CreateUserInput) error {
+    // С║ІтЅЇсЃЂсѓДсЃЃсѓ»сЂДсЃЊсѓИсЃЇсѓ╣тѕцТќГсѓњInteractorсЂФжЏєу┤ёсЂЎсѓІ
+    exists, err := i.userRepo.ExistsByEmail(ctx, input.Email)
+    if err != nil {
+        return fmt.Errorf("failed to check email: %w", err)
+    }
+    if exists {
+        return apperror.ErrDuplicateEntry  // CodedError
+    }
+
+    user := model.NewUser(input.Name, input.Email)
+    if err := i.userRepo.Save(ctx, user); err != nil {
+        return fmt.Errorf("failed to save user: %w", err)
+    }
+    return nil
+}
+```
+
+сЂЊсЂ«Тќ╣Т│ЋсЂфсѓЅсђЂInteractorсЂ»сѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕУЕ│у┤░№╝ѕ`pgconn.PgError`№╝ЅсЂФСЙЮтГўсЂЌсЂЙсЂЏсѓЊсђѓсЂЪсЂасЂЌсђЂС║ІтЅЇсЃЂсѓДсЃЃсѓ»сЂеС┐ЮтГўсЂ«жќЊсЂДсЃгсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ│сЃ│сЃЄсѓБсѓисЃДсЃ│сѓњУхисЂЊсЂЎТЂљсѓїсЂїсЂѓсѓісЂЙсЂЎсђѓсЃѕсЃЕсЃ│сѓХсѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│сѓёсЃдсЃІсЃ╝сѓ»тѕХу┤ёсЂесЂ«СйхућесѓњТцюУејсЂЌсЂдсЂЈсЂасЂЋсЂёсђѓ
+
 ---
